system_directive: Act as an intelligent dispatcher. Read this catalog. When the user requests a task, identify the required skills, load ONLY their specific files from the /skills/ folder, and apply their rules before generating output. Pay strict attention to 'requires_stack'.

skills_catalog.description: Rules for high-signal, constraint-driven ideation. Use to define core features and MVP scope without bloat.
Rules for modern Bento Grid layouts. Use for data-heavy or modern dashboard interfaces.
Heuristics for enterprise/financial UI. Ensures high trust, conservative scales, and clear hierarchy.
MANDATORY for all UI generation. WCAG 2.1 contrast and semantic HTML rules.
Core architecture rules for React and Next.js App Router. Strict rules on Client vs Server components.
Firebase security rules and optimized queries. DO NOT LOAD unless the user explicitly defines Firebase in their stack.
Framework-agnostic SEO rules. Semantic HTML, content hierarchy, and Core Web Vitals theory.
Technical SEO implementation specifically for Next.js App Router (Metadata API, sitemap.ts, robots.ts).
Technical SEO implementation specifically for Astro (astro-seo, static generation, zero-js).
Rules for purposeful animations. Prevents motion sickness and layout shifts.
Architecture for complex forms. Prevents re-render cascades using uncontrolled inputs and schema validation.
Rules for global vs local state. Prioritizes URL state, then Zustand. Strictly prohibits premature Redux.
Rules for auditing and migrating legacy Next.js (Pages Router) to App Router. Prevents paradigm mixing.
CRITICAL rules for handling dates, times, and timezones in scheduling apps. UTC storage vs Local display.
Heuristics for auditing legacy UIs and adapting modern design patterns to specific industry niches (SaaS, E-commerce, etc).
CRITICAL rules for data-dense UIs. Fixes wasted space on PC, massive headers, mobile table scrolling, and enforces text-labeled icons.
Mathematical logic for calculating available time slots based on service duration and external calendar busy periods.
CRITICAL protocol for large projects. Enforces phase-based execution, database schema approval, and prevents the AI from making unauthorized architectural decisions.
Rules for modifying existing code safely. Enforces logic extraction (custom hooks) before UI changes, atomic commits, and parallel component creation.
Protocol for tracing data flow issues (DB -> Network -> State -> UI). Fixes real-time desyncs between different user panels.
Architecture and implementation rules for building autonomous AI agents using Gemini Function Calling, Firebase Cloud Functions, and WhatsApp Webhooks.
Architecture for asynchronous Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) agents using Telegram Webhooks, Firestore State Machines, and Cloud Functions to prevent timeouts.
Firestore architecture and security rules for B2B SaaS applications. Enforces tenant isolation using tenantId.
Implementation of Stripe billing, subscription tiers, and usage-based credit deduction for AI API calls to protect profit margins.
Architecture for long-running AI tasks using Google Cloud Tasks or Pub/Sub, with Firestore listeners for frontend progress updates.
